message:
fix(tests): add missing skip() function and fix regex

- dcg_functional_test.sh: Add skip() function that was used in
  allow-once tests but never defined
- dcg_functional_test.sh: Fix regex pattern - \s is not valid in
  grep extended regex, use [: ] instead
- dcg_slb_integration_test.sh: Remove unused skipped variable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -347,7 +347,6 @@ main() {
 
     local passed=0
     local failed=0
-    local skipped=0
 
     # Run tests
     echo ">> Testing tool availability:"
